title: Slay the Spire: The Board Game - Downfall Expansion Kickstarter Now Live!
author: demileaf
contents:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/29087962/65d256f9e6cab592c85d6922c661c803eae0f8fd.png[/img]
It's finally here!!

The Kickstarter campaign for the [b]Slay the Spire board game Downfall expansion is [url=https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/contentiongames/sts-downfall]LIVE NOW![/url][/b] The fan-favorite community mod for [i]Slay the Spire 1[/i] is getting its own OFFICIAL expansion to [i]Slay the Spire: The Board Game[/i], allowing you and your friends to play as some of the Spire’s infamous bosses. 

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/29087962/9ed7872ef6f6fd17520b16e7d6e73456ad8211bd.jpg[/img]

Don't have your own copy of the base board game yet? You can add it to your pledge (or grab it on its own) during this campaign, too! You can even get a carrying case (aka the Bag of Preparation) that fits both the original game and the expansion inside it!!

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/29087962/9f6b6a0cfacc6fcdbd1e1f56d53d6c724be59232.png[/img]

Back the campaign and get some exclusive Collector's Edition goodies from now until [b]April 9th at 12PM PDT![/b]
